events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: the disconnect not being within sight of the motor/driven machinery violates NEC 430.102 (absent a documented lockable-open-position exception), so this is a **fail** — a correctable installed-defective/non-compliant condition at rough-complete stage, medium risk (shock/LOTO hazard for service personnel), with relocation or a documented exception required before close-out.
